name: Benton Township Park
description: Benton Township Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cheboygan, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: City of Cheboygan Rec Center
description: City of Cheboygan Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cheboygan, MI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The court is free.
